title: CI/CD Pipeline for Node.js Applications Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Node.js-based CI/CD workflows.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of a 'CI/CD Pipeline' for a Node.js application?
options: To automatically build, test, and prepare your application's code for deployment once a change is introduced

questions.question: Which of these is a typical step in a Node.js project's Continuous Integration (CI) pipeline?
options: Installing your project's npm dependencies and then running its automated unit tests
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
